context: Evaluates implementation of VS Code workspace variable expansion and path resolution utilities. The candidate must correctly handle ${workspaceFolder} and ${workspaceFolderBasename} substitution as well as relative-to-absolute path resolution.

checklist.name: ${workspaceFolder} expansion
checklist.description: Correctly replaces ${workspaceFolder} (case-insensitive) with the provided workspace folder path

checklist.name: ${workspaceFolderBasename} expansion
checklist.description: Correctly replaces ${workspaceFolderBasename} with the basename of the workspace folder path

checklist.name: Relative path resolution
checklist.description: resolvePathRelativeToWorkspace resolves relative paths against the workspace folder root using path.resolve

checklist.name: Absolute path normalization
checklist.description: Absolute paths are returned normalized (.. segments resolved) without prepending the workspace path

checklist.name: Edge case handling
checklist.description: Non-string inputs are returned unchanged; empty strings and missing workspace paths are handled without throwing
